searchTagline: Search topics, keywords, and community discussions.
searchPrompt: Enter a keyword to start searching.
sponsorsThanks: Thanks to the sponsors who support GooseForum.
enableJsForBestExperience: Enable JavaScript for the best experience.
adminEnableJs: Please enable JavaScript to use the admin panel.
activationDescSuccess: Your account has been activated. You can now use every forum feature, including posting, replies, and your profile.
activationDescFail: Activation failed. Please check that your activation link is correct, or contact an administrator.
activationExpired: The activation link has expired or is invalid
email.activation.subject: Account activation
email.activation.heading: Welcome to {site}
email.activation.instruction: Click the button below to activate your account:
email.activation.expires: This link is valid for 24 hours
email.copyLink: If the button does not work, copy this link into your browser:
email.passwordReset.subject: Password reset
email.passwordReset.heading: Password reset request
email.passwordReset.instruction: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to continue:
email.passwordReset.expires: This link is valid for 30 minutes
email.passwordReset.ignore: If you did not request this, you can ignore this email
email.passwordReset.keepPrivate: For your account security, do not share this link with anyone
email.passwordReset.contact: If you have questions, contact the support team.
meta.moderationDesc: Handle post bans and unbans within your remit.
meta.searchDesc: Search topics, keywords, and discussions on {site}.
meta.sponsorsDesc: Thanks to the sponsors and community partners who support {site}.
meta.topicDesc: Read “{title}” and join the discussion on {site}.
meta.userDesc: See {username}’s topics, activity, and community connections on {site}.
